chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2621 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.8868/2023. 2. For hearing of CMA No.11722/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 06.02.2025 Mr. Naveed Sultan, advocate and Mr. Hassen Merza, for the petitioner. Mr. Waqas Asad Sheikh, advocate for the respondent 3. Mr. Shamshad Ahmad Narejo, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. This petition has been filed by association stated to be aggrieved by levy of sales tax on services on insurance agents. Prima facie, not a single aggrieved person is petitioner herein and no locus standi of the petitioner is discernable to maintain the present writ. In view hereof, the petitioner could not to be fallen within category of aggrieved person per Article 199 of the Constitution, hence, the petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
